data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation reducing the number of choices at any given point.
data.technical_spec: Limits primary navigation to under 5 choices per menu.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Focuses on minimizing the distance between interactive elements for efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Consistent button sizes with accessibility in mind.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Manages cognitive load by chunking information into digestible groups.
data.technical_spec: Designed with a 7±2 information chunking approach.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Focused on perception and how users visually segment layout and content.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes proximity and similarity for cohesive UI design.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect websites to work similarly to others they are familiar with.
data.technical_spec: Design language aligns with common web standards.
